sep.ContractBoard.Name: sep.ContractBoard
sep.ContractBoard.Description: A wooden bulletin board for managing trade contracts with local NPCs. Check it daily for new contract opportunities!

sep.MarketTerminal.Name: sep.MarketTerminal
sep.MarketTerminal.Description: An electronic terminal displaying real-time market conditions, price multipliers, and supply/demand data across all trade categories.

sep.ATMachine.Name: sep.ATMachine
sep.ATMachine.Description: An automated teller machine connected to the Ferngill Banking Network. Deposit savings, withdraw funds, manage loans, and set up fixed-term accounts.

sep.Supercomputer.Name: sep.Supercomputer
sep.Supercomputer.Description: An advanced forecasting terminal that predicts market saturation trends for the next 14 days across all commodity categories. Essential for strategic selling.

Entries.sep.welcome: Dear @,^^Welcome to the Ferngill Valley Economic Network! As a farmer, you now have access to local trade systems.^^You can craft a Contract Board to manage trade contracts with local merchants, build a Market Terminal to view commodity prices, or set up an ATM Machine for banking services.^^Good luck with your trading endeavors!^   -The Ferngill Chamber of Commerce[#]
Entries.sep.taxBill: Dear @,^^The Ferngill Revenue Service has completed its seasonal assessment of your farm. Your tax obligations have been calculated based on your seasonal income, property values, and utility usage.^^Taxes have been automatically deducted from your account. Open the Tax Bill menu for details.^   -Commissioner Lewis, on behalf of the FRS[#]
Entries.sep.contractComplete: Dear @,^^Congratulations! You have successfully fulfilled a trade contract. Your reputation in the valley continues to grow, and merchants are taking notice of your reliability.^^Keep up the excellent work!^   -The Ferngill Trade Association[#]
Entries.sep.contractBreach: Dear @,^^We regret to inform you that one or more of your trade contracts has expired unfulfilled. This breach has resulted in a reputation penalty and may affect your standing with local merchants.^^Please be more mindful of the commitments you take on.^   -The Ferngill Trade Association[#]
Entries.sep.loanApproved: Dear @,^^Your loan application with the Ferngill Banking Network has been approved! The funds have been deposited into your account.^^Seasonal payments will be automatically deducted. Visit an ATM Machine to view details or make early repayments.^   -Ferngill Banking Network[#]
Entries.sep.loanPaymentDue: Dear @,^^This is a friendly reminder that your seasonal loan payment is due. The amount will be automatically deducted from your account at the start of next season.^^If you have insufficient funds, please make a deposit or visit an ATM to discuss options.^   -Ferngill Banking Network[#]
Entries.sep.debtWarning: NOTICE: OVERDUE ACCOUNT^^Dear @,^^Your loan account is severely past due. If payment is not received soon, the Ferngill Banking Network may take collection action.^^Please visit an ATM Machine immediately to address your outstanding balance.^   -Ferngill Collections Department[#]
Entries.sep.reputationNational: Dear @,^^Your trading reputation has reached new heights! You have been recognized as a National-tier trader by the Ferngill Trade Commission.^^This grants you access to larger Zuzu City contracts and 5x market capacity.^^Congratulations on this milestone!^   -Ferngill Trade Commission[#]
Entries.sep.reputationInternational: Dear @,^^Extraordinary achievement! Your trading reputation has reached the International tier, the highest distinction of the Ferngill Trade Commission.^^You now have access to global export contracts and 25x market capacity. Your farm is truly world-renowned!^   -Ferngill International Trade Office[#]
Entries.sep.marketSurge: MARKET ALERT^^Dear @,^^One or more commodity categories are experiencing a market surge! Demand for affected goods is exceptionally high and prices are at a premium.^^Check your Market Terminal for details and sell now to maximise profits!^   -Ferngill Market Watch[#]
